problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
mechanism: Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling
hypothesis: If Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling is applied to at, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
